incidents.event: Seized by Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) Navy in the Strait of Hormuz for allegedly operating without necessary permits and tampering with navigation systems; escorted to Iranian coast.
Fired upon by IRGC gunboat in the Strait of Hormuz, sustaining heavy damage to the navigation bridge; later seized and escorted to Iranian coast.
Fired upon by IRGC in the Strait of Hormuz but escaped damage and continued toward Gulf of Oman.
Seized by US Navy in the Gulf of Oman near the Strait of Hormuz after attempting to violate US naval blockade of Iranian ports.
Struck by missiles in the Strait of Hormuz while attempting to assist another attacked vessel; four fatalities reported.
Attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, resulting in one fatality; part of a series of attacks on vessels in the strait during early March 2026.
Attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, resulting in one fatality; part of multiple attacks in early March 2026.
Attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, resulting in one fatality; part of multiple attacks in early March 2026.
Seized by Iran's IRGC in the Strait of Hormuz for carrying unauthorized cargo; crew status and location unclear.
